MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT HILL BROTHERS CHEMICAL COMPANY MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Appearances: Robert Bugatto, Esq. of Vasquez Estrada & Dumont, (415) 453-0555 appearing for Defendant and moving party; Jennifer Berg, Esq. of Baron & Budd P.C. (310) 860-0476 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is denied. Court sustains objection to plaintiff's testimony. Even if the court assumes that all of the exposure occurred in Washington, the court applies California law regarding punitive damages. It is doubtful that Washington's interest is to limit plaintiff's damages. California's interest to deter the malicious conduct of one of its residents clearly outweighs Washington's interest. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
